2026-06-12JUSJudges ActOrder authorizing the leave of absence of the Honourable Ritu Khullar Order approving a leave of absence to the Honourable Ritu Khullar, Chief Justice of the Court of Appeal of Alberta, from her judicial duties from July 13, 2026, until January 12, 2027.N/A
subject: Order authorizing the leave of absence of the Honourable Ritu Khullar
precis: Order approving a leave of absence to the Honourable Ritu Khullar, Chief Justice of the Court of Appeal of Alberta, from her judicial duties from July 13, 2026, until January 12, 2027.
